hero.description: Computer Engineering graduate from ESPRIT 🎓, currently in the Freemover program at Philipps University of Marburg 🇩🇪. Passionate about Java, Spring Boot, Angular and CI/CD, I'm actively looking for a software development role and open to relocation across Germany.

about.title: About me
about.presentation: Software engineering graduate from ESPRIT, passionate about web development and DevOps. Currently in the Freemover program at Philipps University of Marburg (Germany), I master Java, Spring Boot, Angular and CI/CD tools. Serious, motivated and an effective team player — available immediately for a position in Germany.
